description_long: This rifle features a compact, bullpup-style design with a predominantly black body and a tan upper receiver. The stock is decorated with a vibrant, multicolored chameleon graphic, adding a unique visual flair. The rifle has a prominent integrated carrying handle and iron sights mounted on top. The magazine appears to be internal or seamlessly integrated, with no visible detachable box. The barrel is short and standard, extending just slightly from the front of the weapon. The overall construction suggests a modern, lightweight firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact black bullpup rifle with a tan upper receiver and a colorful chameleon graphic on the stock, featuring integrated iron sights and a short barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle, front sight, and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chameleon graphic on the stock, the tan upper receiver, and the overall bullpup configuration.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the alignment of the iron sights along the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, again showing the chameleon graphic and the rifle's compact profile.
